creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Larry Rosenman from comment #6)

Ack :) One may want to try a /etc/make.conf:CFLAGS=-fcommon (or adding it to the port) to see if that alone will work.

Rationale for detail in comment 5 is it would be nice to bring the port back to the extent that that's possible.
